title: Practice Volume And Accuracy
description: Review how many questions were attempted and whether accuracy is moving toward the target band.

title: Latest Mock Signal
description: Use the latest saved mock attempt to decide whether to revise or increase timed practice.

title: Route Task Completion
description: Check whether the selected route tasks are being completed consistently.

title: Revision Queue Completion
description: Review how many weak-topic, flashcard and note items have been marked reviewed.

title: Saved Student Notes
description: Use saved notes to identify recurring corrections and next study actions.
